name: production-theorem-claude
description: Claude Code port of production-theorem. Full Orchestrate workflow (planning, context, plugin delegation, execution, validation, UI visual gates, Redis harness awareness, learning) with Claude-specific UI optimizations: UserPromptSubmit hook for out-of-band context injection, PreToolUse Action Rail enforcement, PostToolUse step recording, Stop run finalization. Slim MCP fallback for mid-session refresh; full Theseus MCP registered for Mode 3 power-user access.
